# FreeVideo

> Forever free AI talking avatar video generator. No sign-up, no limits.

FreeVideo lets users type text, pick a voice and AI avatar, and generate a talking video in seconds. The video is rendered entirely in the browser using SpatialReal SDK for photorealistic avatar lip-sync and Fish Audio for text-to-speech.

## Key Facts
- 74+ languages supported
- 28 photorealistic AI avatars
- Forever free — no credit card, no sign-up
- Videos can be used commercially
- Privacy-safe: video rendered in browser, text not stored

## Technology
- Avatar rendering: SpatialReal SDK (real-time 3DGS, not 2D video stream)
- Text-to-speech: Fish Audio S2-Pro (80+ languages, natural emotion)
- Video recording: canvas.captureStream + MediaRecorder
- Frontend: Vue 3 + Vite + Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Hono on Cloudflare Workers

## Links
- Website: https://freevideo.spatialreal.ai
- GitHub: https://github.com/hugleecool/freevideo
- SpatialReal SDK: https://docs.spatialreal.ai
- Fish Audio: https://fish.audio
